message:
fix(fr-runtime): EXEC wrong-arity always uses EXECABORT prefix [bd-frankenredis-execary]

EXEC with extra args outside a MULTI was emitting the plain
'ERR wrong number of arguments for exec command'. Upstream
multi.c::execCommand always wraps the wrong-arity error with
the 'EXECABORT Transaction discarded because of:' prefix
regardless of whether the client is currently in a transaction.

Removed the in_transaction-conditional branch and unified both
paths to emit the EXECABORT-wrapped error.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
